title: oldenlandia richardsonioides var. hirtella
intro: Oldenlandia richardsonioides var. hirtella is a variant of the Oldenlandia richardsonioides plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia richardsonioides var. hirtella is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it may also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
